subcodes.first_line: O blessed child of that noble soul! The shocking and devastating news of the martyrdom of that lamp of guidance hath caused sorrow and grief [3.5s]... ...O peerless Lord! Praised be Thou for having kindled that light in the glass of the Concourse on high
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مبارک فرزند آن بزرگوار خبر موحش مدهش شهادت آن سراج هدی سبب اندوه و احزان
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation
